name: PGYTECH OneGo Solo Sling Bag V2
description: The moss green, 4L OneGo Solo V2 from PGYTECH is a stylish and functional sling designed to hold a camera with a lens plus an 8.3" iPad mini in the main compartment.

features.Key Features:: Holds Camera and Lens | Interior Pockets/Tech Device Sleeve | Anti-Theft Protections, YKK Zippers | Elastic Pen Slot | Splash-Resistant Fabric, Bottom Straps | Interior Divider | 11.8 to 59" Adjustable Strap
